parameters.query: INSERT INTO event_log (workflow_name, execution_id, level, event, message, data) VALUES ('workflow_a_communications', $1, 'info', 'webhook_received', $2, $3::jsonb);

SELECT candidate_id, message AS lock_value FROM event_log WHERE execution_id = $1 AND event = 'lock_acquired' ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT 1

={{ { query: 'mutation CreateCandidate($data: CandidateCreateInput!) { createCandidate(data: $data) { id name consentStatus } }', variables: { data: { whatsappNumberE164: $('Normalise Phone Number').first()?.json?.phoneE164, consentStatus: 'PENDING' } } } }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: 'mutation GrantConsent($id: UUID!) { updateCandidate(id: $id, data: { consentStatus: GRANTED }) { id consentStatus } }', variables: { id: ($('Resolve Candidate by Phone').first()?.json?.data?.candidates?.edges?.[0]?.node?.id || $('Create Candidate in Twenty').first()?.json?.data?.createCandidate?.id || '') } } }}

={{ { query: 'mutation RefuseConsent($id: UUID!) { updateCandidate(id: $id, data: { consentStatus: REFUSED, dataRetentionPolicy: PENDING_DELETION }) { id } }', variables: { id: ($('Resolve Candidate by Phone').first()?.json?.data?.candidates?.edges?.[0]?.node?.id || $('Create Candidate in Twenty').first()?.json?.data?.createCandidate?.id || '') } } }}

value.body: ={{ 'No problem at all, ' + ($('Set Candidate Context').first()?.json?.firstName || 'there') + ". We won't contact you again via WhatsApp. If you change your mind later, just send us a message and we'll start fresh." }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { messaging_product: 'whatsapp', to: $('Normalise Phone Number').first()?.json?.phoneE164 ?? '', type: 'text', text: { body: 'Hi ' + ($('Set Candidate Context').first()?.json?.firstName || 'there') + '! Before we continue, we need your consent to store and process your data as part of our recruitment process, in line with Ghana Data Protection Act. Do you agree? Reply YES to continue or NO to opt out.' } } }}

value.body: ={{ 'Hi ' + ($('Set Candidate Context').first()?.json?.firstName || 'there') + ', you previously asked not to be contacted via WhatsApp. We respect that. If you change your mind, you can send us a message to get started again.' }}

'' } } } } } } }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO candidate_facts (twenty_candidate_id, voice_note_retry_at, updated_at) VALUES ($1, NOW(), NOW()) ON CONFLICT (twenty_candidate_id) DO UPDATE SET voice_note_retry_at = NOW(), updated_at = NOW()
UPDATE candidate_facts SET voice_note_retry_at = NULL, updated_at = NOW() WHERE twenty_candidate_id = $1 AND voice_note_retry_at IS NOT NULL
INSERT INTO conversation (twenty_candidate_id) VALUES ($1) ON CONFLICT (twenty_candidate_id) DO UPDATE SET updated_at = NOW() RETURNING id

INSERT INTO conversation_message (conversation_id, direction, body, wa_message_id, media_type, transcript, transcript_quality, occurred_at) VALUES ($1, 'inbound', $2, $3, $4, $5, $6, NOW()) ON CONFLICT (wa_message_id) DO NOTHING

options.queryReplacement: ={{ [$json.id, $('Normalise Phone Number').first()?.json?.messageBody || (() => { try { return $('Evaluate Transcript Confidence').first()?.json?.transcript || ''; } catch(e) { return ''; } })(), $('Normalise Phone Number').first()?.json?.waMessageId, $('Normalise Phone Number').first()?.json?.messageType === 'audio' ? 'audio' : null, (() => { try { return $('Evaluate Transcript Confidence').first()?.json?.transcript ?? null; } catch(e) { return null; } })(), (() => { try { return $('Evaluate Transcript Confidence').first()?.json?.transcriptQuality ?? null; } catch(e) { return null; } })()] }}

parameters.query: SELECT body, direction, occurred_at FROM conversation_message WHERE conversation_id = $1 ORDER BY occurred_at DESC LIMIT 20
SELECT summary FROM conversation WHERE id = $1

value.systemPrompt: Classify the candidate message intent into exactly one of: workflow_reply, dpa_request, open_conversation, distress, spam. Return JSON only: {"intent": "...", "confidence": 0.0}. workflow_reply = candidate is actively applying for a job OR responding to a screening/interview prompt. Signals: sharing CV/work history, stating job type wanted, listing qualifications/skills, responding to interview questions. dpa_request = asking about their data, deletion, access (words: DATA, DELETE, FORGET, ACCESS). open_conversation = general questions, greetings, or conversation not related to a job application. distress = expressing suicidal ideation, crisis, severe distress. spam = commercial content, nonsense, links only.
value.messages: ={{ $('Fetch Last 20 Messages').all().slice(-5).map(m => ({role: m.json.direction === 'inbound' ? 'user' : 'assistant', content: m.json.body})).concat([{role: 'user', content: $('Normalise Phone Number').first()?.json?.messageBody}]) }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: 'mutation LowConf($data: ReviewTaskCreateInput!) { createReviewTask(data: $data) { id } }', variables: { data: { kind: 'LOW_CONFIDENCE_SCORE', subjectCandidate: { connect: { where: { id: ($('Resolve Candidate by Phone').first()?.json?.data?.candidates?.edges?.[0]?.node?.id || $('Create Candidate in Twenty').first()?.json?.data?.createCandidate?.id || '') ?? '' } } } } } } }}

value.body: ={{ 'Hi ' + ($('Set Candidate Context').first()?.json?.firstName || 'there') + ', thank you for reaching out. We want to make sure you are okay. One of our team will be in touch with you shortly.' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { query: 'mutation Distress($data: ReviewTaskCreateInput!) { createReviewTask(data: $data) { id } }', variables: { data: { kind: 'COMPLIANCE_FLAG', subjectCandidate: { connect: { where: { id: ($('Resolve Candidate by Phone').first()?.json?.data?.candidates?.edges?.[0]?.node?.id || $('Create Candidate in Twenty').first()?.json?.data?.createCandidate?.id || '') ?? '' } } } } } } }}

value.systemPrompt: ={{ 'You are a warm, professional assistant for a Ghanaian HR and recruiting firm in Accra. Keep replies to 1-3 sentences for WhatsApp. Use plain Ghanaian English. Never promise a placement, salary, interview outcome, or timeline. If you are unsure, say you will check with the team. Conversation history follows, then the candidate\'s new message. Previous summary: <<SUMMARY_BEGIN>>' + ($('Fetch Conversation Summary').first()?.json?.summary ?? '') + '<<SUMMARY_END>>' }}
value.messages: ={{ $('Fetch Last 20 Messages').all().slice(-10).map(m => ({role: m.json.direction === 'inbound' ? 'user' : 'assistant', content: m.json.body})).concat([{role: 'user', content: '<<CANDIDATE_MESSAGE_BEGIN>>' + $('Normalise Phone Number').first()?.json?.messageBody + '<<CANDIDATE_MESSAGE_END>>'}]) }}

parameters.query: INSERT INTO conversation_message (conversation_id, direction, body, occurred_at) VALUES ($1, 'outbound', $2, NOW())

'' } } } } } } }}

value.body: ={{ 'Hi ' + ($('Set Candidate Context').first()?.json?.firstName || 'there') + ", thanks for your message. One of our team will get back to you shortly." }}

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO screening_inbox (candidate_id, application_id, trigger_kind, payload)
VALUES (
  $1,
  $2,
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM blue_collar_screening
    WHERE candidate_id = $1 AND status = 'in_progress'
  ) THEN 'blue_collar_reply' ELSE 'blue_collar_new' END,
  CASE WHEN EXISTS (
    SELECT 1 FROM blue_collar_screening
    WHERE candidate_id = $1 AND status = 'in_progress'
  ) THEN jsonb_build_object('messageBody', $3) ELSE NULL END
)
ON CONFLICT (candidate_id) WHERE processed_at IS NULL DO NOTHING
INSERT INTO screening_inbox (candidate_id, application_id, trigger_kind) VALUES ($1, $2, 'new_application') ON CONFLICT (candidate_id) WHERE processed_at IS NULL DO NOTHING
